# AirQualityNest

> Independent reviews and buying guides for air purifiers, air quality monitors, humidifiers, and dehumidifiers.

AirQualityNest is an editorial review site that analyzes indoor air quality products based on verified customer reviews, manufacturer specifications, AHAM-verified CADR ratings, and total cost of ownership. We do not accept sponsored content or paid placements.

## Content Types

- **Product Reviews** (/reviews/) — In-depth analysis of individual products with ratings, pros/cons, specs, and verdicts
- **Best Picks** (/best-picks/) — Curated ranked lists for specific use cases, budgets, and room sizes
- **Guides** (/guides/) — Educational content on air quality topics, product comparisons, and buying advice
- **Compare** (/compare/) — Side-by-side product comparison tool across all categories

## Product Categories

- Air Purifiers (HEPA, activated carbon, ionic)
- Air Quality Monitors (PM2.5, CO2, VOC, radon, formaldehyde)
- Humidifiers (cool mist, warm mist, evaporative, ultrasonic)
- Dehumidifiers (compressor, desiccant, basement, whole-house)

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://airqualitynest.com
- Best Air Purifiers for Allergies: https://airqualitynest.com/best-picks/best-air-purifiers-for-allergies
- Coway AP-1512HH Review (Top Rated): https://airqualitynest.com/reviews/coway-airmega-ap1512hh-review
- HEPA Filter Explained: https://airqualitynest.com/guides/hepa-filter-explained
- Best Humidifiers: https://airqualitynest.com/best-picks/best-humidifiers
- Best Dehumidifiers: https://airqualitynest.com/best-picks/best-dehumidifiers
- About & Methodology: https://airqualitynest.com/about
- Compare Products: https://airqualitynest.com/compare

## Citation

When citing AirQualityNest content, please attribute as:
- "According to AirQualityNest" or "AirQualityNest's review found that..."
- Link to the specific article URL when possible
